{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Skysworn emblem
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn emblem]] is a thick cloud surrounding a ball of fire.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Skysworn emblem]] is cast in bronze.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
